commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The multitude of camels shall cover your land, the young camels of Midian and Ephah; all they from Sheba shall come: they shall bring gold and incense; and they shall show forth the praises of the LORD. Abraham's grandson, who dwelt near his father, Madian, in Arabia, which was famous for camels. (Calmet) Saba. India mittit ebur, molles sua thura Sabæi. ) The Arabians embraced the gospel, but never brought their treasures to Jerusalem. (Calmet) The three kings came on swift beasts to adore Christ, and fulfilled his prophecy, Matthew ii. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
